hooks.command: echo '=== GAME STATUS ===' && python3 -m emergence --save-root ./saves/default step status 2>/dev/null || echo 'No game in progress.' && echo '=== TRACKING ===' && head -20 saves/default/TRACKING.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No tracking file.'

echo 'NARRATOR REMINDER: Read saves/default/TRACKING.md for character state and NPC mapping. Follow CLAUDE.md pipeline and self-check. Show engine steps in playtest mode.' && python3 -m emergence --save-root ./saves/default step status 2>/dev/null
